name: Eastern Bankshares, Inc.
description: Eastern Bankshares, Inc. is the bank holding company for Eastern Bank, a Massachusetts-chartered savings bank founded in 1818. Headquartered in Boston, Eastern Bank is a full-service commercial bank that provides a wide range of banking, wealth management, and insurance services to individuals, businesses, and organizations. It operates branches and offices across eastern Massachusetts, southern and coastal New Hampshire, and Rhode Island, serving as one of the largest independent, mutually-owned banks in New England prior to its initial public offering.
